11.reason: [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors with modern compilers that do not support it by default.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  使用gets不安全，可能导致缓冲区溢出；更关键的是后续访问Cen[i-1]和Cen[i+1]时未检查边界。
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [gets is deprecated and removed in C11 standard, causing compilation error in modern compilers; should use fgets]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  gets() is removed in C11 standard and causes compilation error in modern environments; use fgets() instead.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors with modern compilers that do not support it by default.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Using gets() is unsafe and deprecated; it may cause buffer overflow and is removed in C11 standard, leading to compilation errors with modern compilers]

14.reason: 每次循环调用strlen效率低，但非错误；边界检查应在内部处理。

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  每次循环调用strlen效率低，但非错误；边界检查应在内部处理。

16.reason: 缺少边界检查，当i==0或i==n-1时，Cen[i-1]或Cen[i+1]访问越界。

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  缺少边界检查，当i==0或i==n-1时，Cen[i-1]或Cen[i+1]访问越界。

20.reason: // Missing else clause: if order condition fails, the '-' should be printed, but it is not.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  依赖未检查的下标；且缺少else分支输出'-'（当条件不满足时应原样输出'-'）。
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  // Missing else clause: if order condition fails, the '-' should be printed, but it is not.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  If this condition is false, the '-' character is not printed, violating the requirement to output the input unchanged.

26.reason: 此处缺少else分支，当前后字符类型不同或前>=后时应输出'-'原样。

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.2 , reason:  此处缺少else分支，当前后字符类型不同或前>=后时应输出'-'原样。

18.reason: // Accessing Cen[i-1] and Cen[i+1] without bounds check may cause out-of-bounds when i=0 or i=n-1. Also missing else clause: if this condition fails, the '-' should be printed, but it is not.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  // Accessing Cen[i-1] and Cen[i+1] without bounds check may cause out-of-bounds when i=0 or i=n-1. Also missing else clause: if this condition fails, the '-' should be printed, but it is not.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Array index out of bounds when i=0 (accessing Cen[-1]) or when i is the last index (accessing Cen[i+1]), causing undefined behavior]
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Accessing Cen[i-1] when i=0 causes out-of-bounds array access; also Cen[i+1] may be out-of-bounds if '-' is the last character.

28.reason: [Logical error: when Cen[i]=='-' but expansion conditions fail, the '-' character is skipped and not printed; should print Cen[i] in this case]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Logical error: when Cen[i]=='-' but expansion conditions fail, the '-' character is skipped and not printed; should print Cen[i] in this case]
